title: Sam's Tropical Update
description: An overhaul of Minecraft's jungles, swamps, rivers, and much more
body:
# Sam's Tropcial Update

## - Shell Block Set
  - Shell block crafted from nine nautilus shells
  - Other blocks acquired from stonecutter
## - Thatch set
  - Crafted from wheat and string
  - Can be made into layers
### - Nautilus shells now drop more frequently from drowned
### - The conch is crafted with a nautilus shell, copper, and a music disc
## - Crabs
  - Drops cookable crab meat
  - Bred with cod
  - Secretly like bamboo fence gates
## - Fireflies
  - Spawn at night in swamps and mangrove swamps
## - Bottle of Firefly
  - Right click firefly with glass bottle
  - Gives the achievment "Gotcha!"
  - Drinkable for glowing
## - River Dolphin
  - Spawns in rivers and swamps
## - Tiki totems
  - Most sherds can be offhanded, then strip a log with an axe for one of twenty cool totems!
## - Jungles
  - Removed jungle bushes
  - Mud and podzol spawn in patches
  - Low ferns and Reina del Noche will spawn on the underside of trees
    - Reina del Noche can be brewed for blindness potions
  - Jungle rivers spawn
## - Vine swinging
  - Pressing sprint on vines will destroy the vine and allow the player to swing
## - Blossomed Lilypad
  - Acquired from bonemealing a normal lilypad
## - Currents
  - Spawn at river surface
  - Push the player in a random cardinal direction
  - Emit particles
## - Swamps
  - **Now have tupelo trees
    - Tupelo wood set**
  - Cattails
  - Glowing swamp algae
### - Added a music disc at a friend's request, "Log One" by Dippin
## - Tide pools
  - Sandy on beaches
  - Stony on stony shore
## - Beach grass
  - Spawns in beaches
  - Only placeable on sand
  - Breaks via shears
